allow: PowerShell($routes = @\("/", "/diagnostico", "/dashboard", "/avaliacoes", "/feedbacks", "/pagina-avaliacao", "/concorrentes", "/configuracoes", "/planos", "/login", "/cadastro", "/r/clinica-sorriso", "/diagnostico/clinica-sorriso-sumare/analise"\); foreach \($r in $routes\) { try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$r" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Output "$\($resp.StatusCode\) $r" } catch { Write-Output "ERR $r : $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
